00083-canvas-padding-edit-ui.reason: On a default 0-padding auto-layout frame the on-canvas left padding band is not rendered: hovering shows nothing and double-clicking the inner edge deselects the frame instead of opening the padding editor. The agent completed the goal only via a properties-panel workaround (set padding 20 first), then set left padding to 40.

00102-copy-as-png-ui.reason: All failing runs performed the menu flow correctly, but the app toasted 'Clipboard unavailable — downloaded PNG instead' because the async Clipboard API is unavailable on the insecure http://cua_designpen.web origin; the app degraded gracefully, so this is an environment/origin constraint, not app logic.

00317-type-feature-generic-ui.reason: The Type settings Details tab has no 'Standard ligatures' (liga) toggle — Letterforms only offers Rare ligatures, Contextual alternates, and Ordinals — so the requested step is impossible; verified exhaustively in all 5 runs (matches the same finding from prior job a03c9bd1).

10002-calc-mcp.reason: All 3 failing runs died on the first tool call with 'OpenPencil app is not connected' from the MCP bridge; no app logic was ever reached.

10009-get-selection-mcp.reason: The single failing run was blocked at the first create_shape call by the 'OpenPencil app is not connected' MCP bridge error.

10018-set-text-mcp.reason: Both failing runs hit 'OpenPencil app is not connected' on the first create_shape call and could not proceed.

10028-arrange-mcp.reason: The single failing run was blocked at the first create_shape call by the 'OpenPencil app is not connected' MCP bridge error.

10035-clone-node-mcp.reason: Both failing runs hit 'OpenPencil app is not connected' on the first create_shape call; no app behavior was exercised.

10042-create-slice-mcp.reason: In the 2 runs where tools worked, create_slice produced a node with correct name/position/size but type FRAME instead of SLICE (verified via get_node/find_nodes) — an app-logic bug. The other 3 runs were blocked by 'OpenPencil app is not connected' infra errors; the app bug is the actionable dominant cause since the task fails whenever the tool actually runs.

10055-done-with-changes-mcp.reason: All 3 failing runs were blocked at the first create_shape call by the 'OpenPencil app is not connected' MCP bridge error.

10070-insert-icon-mcp.reason: All 5 runs failed on the first insert_icon call with 'OpenPencil app is not connected'; nothing app-specific was reached.

10078-node-bindings-mcp.reason: Both failing runs were blocked at the first create_collection call by the 'OpenPencil app is not connected' MCP bridge error.

10085-page-bounds-mcp.reason: Both failing runs were blocked at the first create_shape call by the 'OpenPencil app is not connected' MCP bridge error.

10094-search-icons-mcp.reason: Two failing runs were fully blocked by 'OpenPencil app is not connected'; the third hit the same connection error on the first search_icons call, retried, and completed the goal but reported not-approve because of the initial infra hiccup.

10101-set-image-fill-mcp.reason: Both failing runs were blocked at the first create_shape call by the 'OpenPencil app is not connected' MCP bridge error.

10113-set-visible-mcp.reason: Both failing runs were blocked at the first create_shape call by the 'OpenPencil app is not connected' MCP bridge error.

10122-get-codegen-prompt-mcp.reason: set_text non-deterministically corrupted a line of long content (textDecoration mapping stored as text-transform) on the first write; an identical re-issued call stored it correctly, indicating a flaky write/data-integrity bug in the app's set_text path (plus a dropped trailing newline).

30016-set-text-mcp.reason: Both failing tails are nothing but a repeating '0123456789' flood (the agent's 5000-character stress payload) with no final message or verdict — the runs drowned their own context/output in the giant string and never delivered a report; 3/5 runs of the same task passed, so app and infra handled it.
